description: SR OS telemetry, Internet edge BGP, and subscriber activity.

panels.description: PPPoE subscriber session data sourced from /state/subscriber-mgmt/subscriber/.../session[type=ppp]

targets.expr: max by (subscriber_subscriber_id) (((subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_up_time{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber", session_type="ppp"}) and on (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, session_id) (subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_active{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber", session_type="ppp"} == 1))) / 100

panels.title: PPPoE Session Detail

panels.description: Subscriber sessions and QoS traffic sourced directly from /state/subscriber-mgmt/subscriber[...]
panels.title: Subscriber Lens · State Tree

targets.expr: avg(max by (subscriber_subscriber_id) ((subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_up_time{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"}) and on (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, session_id) (subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_active{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"} == 1))) / 100

max(max by (subscriber_subscriber_id) ((subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_up_time{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"}) and on (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, session_id) (subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_active{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"} == 1))) / 100

sum by (subscriber_subscriber_id) ((rate(subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_ingress_qos_statistics_ipv4_forwarded_octets{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, sla_profile_instance_id) group_left() max by (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, sla_profile_instance_id) (subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_active{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"} == 1))) * 8

sum by (subscriber_subscriber_id) ((rate(subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_ingress_qos_statistics_ipv6_forwarded_octets{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, sla_profile_instance_id) group_left() max by (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, sla_profile_instance_id) (subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_active{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"} == 1))) * 8

sum by (subscriber_subscriber_id) (rate(subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_egress_qos_statistics_in_inplus_profile_dropped_packets{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, sla_profile_instance_id) group_left() max by (source, subscriber_subscriber_id, sla_profile_instance_id) (subscriber_mgmt_subscriber_sla_profile_instance_session_active{source=~"$Node", subscriber_subscriber_id=~"$Subscriber"} == 1))
